title: TSMC is accelerating Arizona factory buildout to capitalize on AI 'megatrend,' CFO says
summary_full: Speaking in an interview with CNBC, TSMC's Wendell Huang said the fresh investment comes on the back of robust customer demand.
summary_public: Speaking in an interview with CNBC, TSMC's Wendell Huang said the fresh investment comes on the back of robust customer demand.
